transcription: Njengoba uneBronchitis isibangele ukuthinteka kwemucosa yomphimbo ebesekubanga izimpawu ezinjokukhwehlela kanye nokuncipha kwebronchus.
translation: As you are having bronchitis it has lead to irritation of the mucosa of the throat and causing the symptoms like cough and constriction of the bronchus.
reference: As you are having bronchitis it has lead to irritation of the mucosa of the throat and causing the symptoms like cough and constriction of the bronchus.
hypothesis: I have bronchitis caused by a mucus buildup in the lungs, which was causing symptoms such as coughing and shortness of breath in the bronchi.

transcription: Ungakhathazeki kakhulu. Akumele uzithathele wena umshanguzo uma uzizwa ungaphilile kodwa xhumana nodokotela akwazise inkinga futhi nendlela yokiyilapha.
translation: I suggest you not to worry much.  You should not take self medicines for any health problems.  Consult a psycatrist for diagnosis and treatment.
reference: I suggest you not to worry much.  You should not take self medicines for any health problems.  Consult a psycatrist for diagnosis and treatment.
hypothesis: If your child is very sick, you should take him to the hospital if he won't breathe. In relation to the doctor, he informed you of the infection and the reason for it.

transcription: Eminyakeni emithathu edlule iAST neALT kwavela ukuthi amazinga akhona anyukile kanti neUltrasound ( kade bebheka imbangela yeUpper right quadrant ache) kwavele amafutha kwisbindi
translation: Approximately 3 years ago my ast & alt levels were very slightly raised & an unltrasound (they were checking source of upper right quadrant ache) showed mild fatty liver.
reference: Approximately 3 years ago my ast & alt levels were very slightly raised & an unltrasound (they were checking source of upper right quadrant ache) showed mild fatty liver.
hypothesis: My nurse told me at the ER and ALT that the levels are high, and the ultrasound was looking into the cause of the upper right quadrant ache coming from the liver.
